mapper.select: SELECT order_id, customer_id, product_id, destination_id, delivery_date, shipping_date, message, order_status, order_date, total_amount, created_at, updated_at FROM orders
SELECT order_id, customer_id, product_id, destination_id, delivery_date, shipping_date, message, order_status, order_date, total_amount, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (customer_id, product_id, destination_id, delivery_date, shipping_date, message, order_status, order_date, total_amount) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{productId}, #{destinationId}, #{deliveryDate}, #{shippingDate}, #{message}, #{orderStatus}, #{orderDate}, #{totalAmount})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET customer_id = #{customerId}, product_id = #{productId}, destination_id = #{destinationId}, delivery_date = #{deliveryDate}, shipping_date = #{shippingDate}, message = #{message}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, order_date = #{orderDate}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
